resultList.dtldesc: Discover this thoughtfully designed 2 BHK apartment in the rapidly developing neighbourhood of Padur, Chennai. Located within the Urbanrise Revolution One project, this ready-to-move semi-furnished home is ideal for families or professionals seeking a convenient, modern lifestyle in a well-connected residential area. With proximity to reputed schools, hospitals, and shopping hubs, it offers both comfort and accessibility.Property SpecificationsThe apartment spans a super built-up area of 649 sq. ft and a carpet area of 399 sq. ft, featuring two bedrooms, one bathroom, a livingdining area, and a balcony overlooking the society view. The bedrooms are semi-furnished and include wardrobes, while the livingdining area provides ample space for daily living. The kitchen is modular, with provision for a chimney, and comes equipped with cabinets and space for modern appliances. Vitrified flooring is used throughout, and the property is east-facing, ensuring ample natural light and ventilation. The apartment is situated on the 6th floor of a 19-floor building, offering a pleasant view of the surroundings.FacilitiesUrbanrise Revolution One provides essential amenities for a modern lifestyle. The building is equipped with 24-hour water supply, reliable electricity with an inverter-based power backup, and security measures including CCTV surveillance and professional staff. Six lifts ensure smooth access to all floors, while covered parking is available for residents. The society also includes recreational and lifestyle facilities, adding convenience and comfort for all family members.LocalityPadur is a well-connected and developing area on the OMR corridor, providing easy access to the East Coast Road ECR and surrounding neighbourhoods. The apartment is adjacent to Chettinad Hospital and opposite Hindustan College, ensuring access to healthcare and educational facilities within 2-3 km. Metro connectivity is under development just 2 km away, while nearby malls, supermarkets, and restaurants are within a 5 km radius. Public transport links are strong, making commuting seamless, and banking, ATMs, and other essential services are easily accessible.
